summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GetLocal V2 Data Capture Upgrades including candidate onboarding enhancements, employer job posting features, and UI synchronization

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Frontend functionality works correctly, suggests API endpoint stability issues

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: API returns 500 errors in backend tests but works in frontend

passed_tests: Manual form contains all V2 fields (Name, Work Type, Experience, Summary, Address, Relocation toggle)
Manual candidate creation with address and will_relocate works successfully
Salary field supports Fixed Monthly / Salary Range toggle on /post-job page
Perks & Benefits multi-select with 6 options (meals, accommodation, pf_esi, transport, uniform, bonus)
Job posting with all V2 fields successful
Candidate cards display address information on /hire page
Relocation badge shows correctly (✓ Will Relocate / ✗ Won't Relocate)
Full end-to-end workflow: Create candidate → Post job → View candidates with V2 data
